name: 2091 & 2121 Best Place — Aurora, IL
location: 2091 & 2121 Best Pl, Aurora, IL · 16-Unit Multifamily Portfolio
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body:
AJ Commercial Group is proud to announce the sale of 2091 & 2121 Best Place, a 16-unit multifamily portfolio in Aurora, Illinois. This off-market opportunity featured two adjacent all-electric 8-unit buildings with stable tenancy, operational efficiency, and multiple paths for income growth.

Located in one of the fastest-growing corridors of the western suburbs, the asset offered both scale and upside in a supply-constrained rental market.

name: 7327 W 80th Street — Bridgeview, IL
location: 7327 W 80th St, Bridgeview, IL · 4-Unit Multifamily
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body:
AJ Commercial Group is pleased to announce the successful sale of 7327 W 80th Street, a well-maintained 4-unit multifamily property located in the high-demand suburb of Bridgeview, Illinois. This property features a diverse unit mix and solid building fundamentals, making it a strong long-term investment in the Southwest Suburban rental market.

The unit mix includes one (1) three-bedroom, two-bath unit, two (2) two-bedroom units, and one (1) one-bedroom unit. Several units have been partially updated with features such as granite countertops, new flooring, and modern vanities, offering upside through continued cosmetic improvements.

The property is serviced by an older boiler system and offers tenants private, comfortable living just minutes from major retail, schools, and transportation corridors.

name: Carolyn Apartments — Eureka
location: 108–218 Carolyn Ln, Eureka, IL · 18-Unit Multifamily
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body: Carolyn Apartments is a three-building multifamily asset located in Eureka, Illinois. The property consists of three solid brick apartment buildings totaling 18 units and offers stable in-place cash flow with significant recent capital improvements. Ownership completed extensive renovations between 2017–2025, including unit interior updates, roofing replacements, boiler replacements, flooring upgrades, paint and trim improvements, and selective garage additions. The asset is positioned in a low-supply Central Illinois rental market with continued upside through rent growth.

name: 5200 N Potawatomie Ave — Chicago — O
location: 5200 N Potawatomie Ave, Chicago, IL · 6-Unit Multifamily
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body:
AJ Commercial Group is pleased to announce the successful sale of 5200 N Potawatomie Avenue, a six-unit multifamily property located on Chicago's Northwest Side. The building consists of six (6) two-bedroom, one-bath units, with three units recently remodeled featuring updated kitchens and bathrooms.

All tenants are on month-to-month leases, providing new ownership with flexibility to increase rents or reposition units over time.

Located in a quiet residential pocket with easy access to local schools, parks, and transportation, the property is well-positioned for long-term stability and income growth.

name: 10608-10610 S Central Ave — Chicago Ridge, IL
location: 10608-10610 S Central Ave, Chicago Ridge, IL · 12-Unit Multifamily
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body:
AJ Commercial Group is pleased to announce the sale of a 12-unit multifamily building located in Chicago Ridge, Illinois. This stabilized asset featured a desirable unit mix, key building upgrades, and long-term tenant appeal.

The property consists of six (6) two-bedroom units and six (6) one-bedroom units, with all units having been updated in 2018. Interior improvements included refreshed kitchens, bathrooms, and common areas — positioning the property for consistent performance with minimal deferred maintenance.

Major capital improvements included a new roof and updated vinyl windows, offering reduced future maintenance and improved efficiency. Located in a quiet residential pocket of Chicago Ridge, the property benefits from strong rental demand and proximity to transit, retail, and employers.

This sale represents another example of AJ Commercial Group's ability to execute value-aligned sales for stabilized, cash-flowing assets in Chicago's southern suburbs.

name: 3158 West 93rd Street — Evergreen Park, IL
location: 3158 W 93rd St, Evergreen Park, IL · 11-Unit Multifamily
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body:
AJ Commercial Group is proud to announce the sale of 3158 West 93rd Street, a well-maintained 11-unit multifamily property located in the heart of Evergreen Park, Illinois. Built in 1961, this brick building features a mix of spacious units with updated finishes, strong in-place tenancy, and key amenities that appeal to renters in a competitive suburban market.

The property includes secure entry, on-site laundry, and parking lot with seven total spots, including three covered spaces. Each unit features modern appliances and functional layouts, supporting long-term rentability and low turnover.

Located near parks, schools, shopping, and public transportation, this building is positioned within a strong rental corridor known for low vacancy rates and consistent demand.

name: 1185 Surrey Drive — Glen Ellyn, IL
location: 1185 Surrey Dr, Glen Ellyn, IL · 6-Unit Multifamily
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body: AJ Commercial Group is pleased to present 1185 Surrey Drive, a fully updated six-unit multifamily property located in the highly desirable suburb of Glen Ellyn, Illinois. This stabilized asset offers a strong unit mix, significant recent capital improvements, and rare off-street parking — positioning it as a compelling turnkey investment in one of DuPage County's most sought-after rental markets.

name: 366 Walker Avenue — Highland Park, IL
location: 366 Walker Ave, Highland Park, IL · 4-Unit Multifamily
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body:
AJ Commercial Group is pleased to announce the sale of 366 Walker Avenue, a fully updated four-unit multifamily property located in Highland Park, Illinois. This well-maintained building features a desirable unit mix, recent renovations, and strong in-place cash flow in one of the North Shore's most sought-after communities.

The property includes (2) two-bedroom units, (1) one-bedroom unit, and (1) studio, along with a detached coach house and an unrented 2-car garage. Three of the four units were fully remodeled with updated kitchens and bathrooms. Recent capital improvements include a 5-year-old roof, 2-year-old windows, and copper plumbing.

name: 509 Kungs Way — Joliet, IL
location: 509 Kungs Way, Joliet, IL · 4-Unit Multifamily
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body:
AJ Commercial Group is proud to announce the sale of 509 Kungs Way, a well-maintained 4-unit multifamily property located in Joliet, Illinois. This stabilized asset features fully updated units, solid in-place rents, and strong operational fundamentals — making it an attractive long-term investment in a growing suburban market.

The building consists of three (3) two-bedroom units and one (1) one-bedroom unit, all offering clean, updated interiors. The property is serviced by a high-efficiency boiler, with updated electric panels (breaker system) and newer vinyl windows. The roof is approximately 10 years old, and all units were well-maintained at the time of sale.

With tenants responsible for electricity and the owner covering gas and water, this low-maintenance asset delivers consistent cash flow in a high-demand rental corridor near schools, retail, and public transit in Joliet.

name: 8160 W 84th Street — Justice, IL
location: 8160 W 84th St, Justice, IL · 6-Unit Multifamily
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body: AJ Commercial Group is pleased to announce the successful sale of 8160 W 84th Street, a stabilized six-unit apartment building located in the growing southwest suburb of Justice, Illinois. The property featured a consistent rent roll, strong tenant base, and recent capital improvements that support long-term performance with minimal oversight.

name: Marengo 8-Unit Multifamily — Marengo
location: Marengo, IL · 8-Unit Multifamily
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body:
AJ Commercial Group is proud to announce the successful sale of this 8-unit multifamily property located in Marengo, Illinois. This stabilized asset offered consistent rental income, strong tenant demand, and access to one of Chicagoland's resilient suburban submarkets.

The property reflects the kind of suburban Chicago multifamily deal AJ Commercial Group continues to source and close — pairing motivated sellers with the right investor profile.

name: Mississippi Lofts — Davenport
location: 425 E 2nd St, Davenport, IA 52801 · 55-Unit Mixed-Use
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body: Mississippi Lofts is a luxury multifamily property located in downtown Davenport, Iowa, overlooking the Mississippi River. The asset features contemporary loft-style apartments with modern finishes and a prime riverfront location within the Quad Cities market. The property was acquired by Becovic Holdings as part of its continued expansion into the Midwest multifamily sector. Anthony and Joey represented the transaction in the sale of the property.

location: Oak Lawn, IL · 5-Unit Multifamily

The property reflects the kind of suburban Chicago multifamily deal AJ Commercial Group continues to source and close — pairing motivated sellers with the right investor profile.

name: Pekin Place Apartments — Pekin, IL
location: 2207-2231 Brookdale Ln, Pekin, IL · 36-Unit Multifamily
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body:
AJ Commercial Group is pleased to announce the sale of Pekin Place Apartments, a 36-unit multifamily property located in Pekin, Illinois. This asset provided a strong value-add opportunity with a mix of updated units, solid physical condition, and flexible lease terms.

The property features an even mix of one-bedroom and two-bedroom units, with 80% of the units already updated with modern finishes. It's a fully electric building, simplifying utility setups and reducing mechanical complexity. Major capital improvements have already been completed, including newer windows and roof (both approx. 5 years old).

At the time of sale, the majority of tenants were on month-to-month leases, giving new ownership flexibility to capture rental upside through lease renewals and continued upgrades. Pekin Place Apartments offered an ideal blend of stability and upside for private investors seeking Midwest yield.

name: 108 Terry Drive — Roselle, IL
location: 108 Terry Dr, Roselle, IL · 3-Unit Property
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body: AJ Commercial Group is pleased to announce the sale of 108 Terry Drive, a fully renovated 3-unit property located in the heart of Downtown Roselle, Illinois. This asset blends modern amenities with long-term functionality in a walkable, high-demand suburban location — making it an ideal investment or owner-occupant opportunity.

name: 534 E Washington Street — Round Lake Park, IL
location: 534 E Washington St, Round Lake Park, IL · 12-Unit Multifamily
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body:
AJ Commercial Group is proud to announce the off-market sale of 534 E Washington Street, a 12-unit multifamily building located in Round Lake Park, Illinois. This well-maintained asset features a consistent unit mix, capital improvements, and strong tenant demand in a growing suburban market.

The property consists of twelve (12) one-bedroom, one-bath units, with nine units fully updated. Renovations include modern finishes and newer windows in updated units. The building operates on a fully electric system, reducing mechanical complexity and long-term maintenance costs.

name: 17510 Ridgeland Avenue — Tinley Park, IL
location: 17510 Ridgeland Ave, Tinley Park, IL · 4-Unit Multifamily
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body:
AJ Commercial Group is pleased to announce the successful sale of 17510 Ridgeland Avenue, a fully updated 4-unit multifamily property located in the strong suburban rental market of Tinley Park, Illinois. This stabilized asset features a functional unit mix and key building upgrades that support long-term performance with minimal deferred maintenance.

The building includes three (3) two-bedroom units and one (1) one-bedroom unit, all of which have been updated. Recent capital improvements include a 3–4-year-old roof, newer vinyl windows, and a boiler replaced within the last 7–8 years. The property also features four (4) garage spaces, each rented separately to generate additional income.

Located near shopping, schools, and major transportation routes, this asset provided strong tenant appeal and operational simplicity for incoming ownership.

name: River Birch Apartments — Toledo, OH
location: 4841 Monroe St, Toledo, OH · 224-Unit Multifamily
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
body:
AJ Commercial Group is proud to announce the successful sale of River Birch Apartments, a 224-unit multifamily property located in Toledo, Ohio. This value-add asset offered significant upside with a strong renovation trajectory already in motion at the time of closing.

Of the 224 units, 140 were fully remodeled with modern kitchens, bathrooms, flooring, and finishes — representing a substantial capital improvement by long-term ownership. Rents for renovated units reached up to $975/month, compared to $670/month average in-place rents across the community, offering strong income growth potential for new ownership.

River Birch had been family owned and operated for over 30 years, demonstrating exceptional long-term care and community reputation. The property also benefits from a prime walkable location — steps from major shopping centers, restaurants, and neighborhood amenities.

name: Waterbury Apartments — Roselle
location: 403–407 Dorchester St, Roselle, IL 60172 · 24-Unit Multifamily
description: Chicago and Midwest multifamily advisors. Trusted by owners. Backed by data. Specialized in multifamily dispositions across Chicago, the southwest suburbs, and beyond.
